fingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the metric configuration. Available alongside metric_uuid on each metric in the experiment's metrics array.

id.description: A unique integer value identifying this experiment.

metric_uuid.description: UUID of the metric to fetch timeseries for. Available on each metric in the experiment's metrics array.

projectId.description: Override the active project for this single call only. Does not change the active project — use switch-project for a persistent change. Defaults to the active project when omitted. Must be a project the API key can access, or the call returns a permission error.
